name: Pushpay Church Giving & ChMS API
what_it_does: Pushpay REST API for church giving and community management platform. Enables AI agents to manage giving records and donor profiles, process recurring donations and one-time gifts, retrieve church membership and engagement data, manage campuses and funds, access giving analytics and reports, handle check-in and group data, and integrate church financial data with accounting and ChMS systems.
use_cases: Retrieving donor giving history and recurring gift status from stewardship agents
Accessing membership and engagement data from congregation management agents
Generating giving reports for fund accounting from finance reporting agents
Managing campus and fund data from multi-site church management agents
not_for: Non-religious organizations without church giving and tithing focus
General nonprofit fundraising without church community management
Commercial payment processing without faith community workflows
best_when: A church using Pushpay wants AI agents to automate giving tracking, donor engagement analysis, multi-site fund reporting, and integration with accounting systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Donor giving and church membership data is sensitive personal information. Religious affiliation data has heightened privacy protections. Financial giving data requires careful stewardship.

auth.notes: Pushpay uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials. Scopes control access to payments, people, and reporting data. Partner program for ChMS and technology integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — church payment platform enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-giving-volume transaction fees plus monthly platform fees; enterprise pricing for large churches
pricing.notes: New Zealand company (Auckland), public company on ASX until taken private in 2023. Includes Church Community Builder (CCB) ChMS acquired 2019. Dominant church giving platform in North America.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Religious giving and membership data requires heightened sensitivity
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
Pushpay + CCB (Church Community Builder) are integrated but have different API surfaces
NZ/US company — US data residency; taken private in 2023
Transaction-based pricing — automated giving processing must account for fees
ACH and card processing have different processing timelines — verify fund availability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Religious giving and church membership data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency. New Zealand origin, US operations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Church giving and membership data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency.
